propositions: Leaf plans drift from their parent epic's declared scope and no existing criterion catches divergence until epic-close verification.
Add a new AGENT plan-review criterion G7 that checks a leaf plan is a subset of its parent's declared scope, with the parent winning on conflict.
G7 routes only on tickets that have a parent_id and no children, exempting bugs and session_logs, via a new require_parent_id axis in applies() and route_criteria().
G7's agent reads the parent ticket at runtime through the always-available show_ticket tool using the parent_id already in ticket-graph context, adding no new context-assembly plumbing.
Ship G7 advisory at 0.95 while recording fire-rate/validity from plan_review_result_v1 sidecars, with a committed promotion-path doc describing the jq query and the 0.6-0.7 promotion band.
Coaching directs realigning the leaf to the parent, or updating the parent first to force its re-review, never silently diverging the leaf.
